textByHash.0d85a0dd101f95ba4150f029935ba1aff05dd043: I don't think the king would send a mourner to tell me this. Go away!
textByHash.56599fae03137010b695301a48ae2483edd823fa: I don't think the king would send a citizen to tell me this. Go away!
textByHash.7678166ce899435a58ea3bf83e1490e465cb515a: Here, look at my lovely gems.
textByHash.cd66efd5dc0da22cab93c342bacecd5f3d30273f: But the king is one of my biggest customers! I hope he realises that I'll have to increase my prices and he won't be exempt from that!
textByHash.ea3095e0fd1b2d94a8c6aec869785fdfef7b3845: You're the one who stole from me! Guards! Guards!
